agentSupport.notes: PROBE+ self-validating capability manifest for the APS loop: detect (never assume) test/lint/typecheck/build commands, CI, isolation, branch protections, secret tooling, and package manager once per repo; cache with per-command hash + test count + output sample; re-probe on config-hash mismatch; smoke test, zero-test escalation, and VERIFY_INCOMPLETE guards prevent false greens. Portability keystone, highest-risk component. Design change #1 / gap G1.
